title: Apple's rumored upgrades to its Mac lineup go beyond touchscreens - Engadget
summary: In the more immediate future, Bloomberg writes that Apple has prepped updates to the iMac and entry-level 14-inch MacBook Pro for this fall, with a likely focus on chip bumps to the M5 chip and upcoming M6 chip, respectively.
